failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: w2M7XP
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 401 Documented: 200, 422
[401] Unauthorized:
`{"detail":"Invalid username or password."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"password": "000000", "username": "000"}' https://pircsp-cursach.onrender.com/api/auth/login

1. Test Case ID: vzepRq
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 403 Documented: 201, 422
[403] Forbidden:
`{"detail":"Not enough permissions."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"questions": [{"options": [{"is_correct": false, "text": "0"}, {"is_correct": false, "text": "0"}], "prompt": "00000"}], "title": "000"}' https://pircsp-cursach.onrender.com/api/tests

1. Test Case ID: ACaW3I
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 403 Documented: 200, 422
[403] Forbidden:
`{"detail":"Not enough permissions."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"is_published": true}' https://pircsp-cursach.onrender.com/api/tests/6/publish

1. Test Case ID: 2IfIea
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200, 422
[400] Bad Request:
`{"detail":"Every question must be answered exactly once."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"answers": [{"option_id": 0, "question_id": 0}]}' https://pircsp-cursach.onrender.com/api/tests/6/submit

1. Test Case ID: t9hikv
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 403 Documented: 200, 422
[403] Forbidden:
`{"detail":"Not enough permissions."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' https://pircsp-cursach.onrender.com/api/tests/5/attempts

1. Test Case ID: e9ZFoQ
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 403 Documented: 200, 422
[403] Forbidden:
`{"detail":"Not enough permissions."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"questions": [{"options": [{"is_correct": false, "text": "0"}, {"is_correct": false, "text": "0"}], "prompt": "00000"}], "title": "000"}' https://pircsp-cursach.onrender.com/api/tests/1

1. Test Case ID: r6SFtL
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 404 Documented: 200, 422
[404] Not Found:
`{"detail":"Test not found."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' https://pircsp-cursach.onrender.com/api/tests/438

1. Test Case ID: U1Bqff
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 403 Documented: 204, 422
[403] Forbidden:
`{"detail":"Not enough permissions."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X DELETE -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' https://pircsp-cursach.onrender.com/api/tests/1
